GSE303984.reasoning: Samples are explicitly annotated as TCR libraries from a single-cell 5' CITE-seq experiment studying COVID-19 infection and vaccination in PBMCs. | Samples correspond to distinct 10x Chromium 5' transcriptomic (GEX) or targeted immune repertoire (TCR) libraries sequenced as part of a multi-modal CITE-seq experiment studying PBMC T-cell responses to COVID-19 infection and vaccination vaccines. | Samples are explicitly separated by omic layer ('GEX' in title, '5' mRNA library' in description) and belong to an overarching CITE-seq experiment studying COVID-19 vaccine/infection responses in PBMCs. | Samples split by layer where GEX targets RNA transcripts via 5' scRNA-seq and ADT targets surface proteins and hashtags via CITE-seq (TotalSeq-C), originating from healthy vaccinated or previously COVID-19 infected donor PBMCs. | The series characterizes responses in PBMC of COVID-19 infected and vaccinated individuals; these specific samples are isolated CITE-seq (ADT + HTO hash) libraries derived from TotalSeq-C compatible chemistry on the 10x Chromium 5' platform. | Experiment is a multiplexed CITE-seq dataset studying COVID-19 infection and vaccination from PBMC samples using 10x Chromium 5' chemistry (TotalSeq-C for ADT and cell hashing, and 5' for GEX). | Samples are part of a CITE-seq experiment capturing 5' GEX, TCR, ADT, and cell hashing (multiplexed groups) in PBMCs from COVID-19 infected/vaccinated donors, split by measurement layer.

GSE305370.reasoning: Samples were isolated from four healthy human donors, identifying them as Healthy peripheral blood. Explicit mention of 'GEX library' isolated via 10x Feature Barcoding (CITE-seq) assigns scRNA-seq assay to the experiment. | The series describes single-cell CITE-seq profiling (GEX and ADT libraries) of healthy mobilized peripheral blood CD34+ HSPCs, splitting each layer into separate GSMs. | Samples are from mobilized peripheral blood hematopoietic stem and progenitor cells (HSPCs) isolated from healthy human donors, presenting separate ADT libraries from CITE-seq and GEX libraries from 10x Multiome. | Samples are CD34+ HSPCs isolated from healthy human donors, specifically sequenced for RNA expression as the Gene Expression (GEX) split of a 10x Chromium Multiome experiment. | Samples were sourced from peripheral blood of healthy donors and measured using the 10x Single Cell Multiome (GEX and ATAC) technology as explicitly mentioned in the overall design and descriptions. | Samples are described as ATAC-seq libraries generated from CD34+ HSPCs isolated from healthy donors' peripheral blood using the 10x Chromium Single Cell Multiome platform.

GSE320155.reasoning: Samples were generated using 10x Genomics (assumed 5' chemistry due to paired TCR profiling). Titles clearly separate individual libraries (GEX, ADT, VDJ) representing gene expression, surface protein (CITE-seq), and TCR repertoire for CD4+ T cell subsets from liver metastasis patients. | Authors uploaded GEX, ADT, and VDJ layers as distinct GEO samples per biological sample, splitting them by molecule and library type. | The series describes single-cell profiling (scRNA-seq, CITE-seq, TCR-seq) of CD4+ T cells from HCC and background liver using the 10x Genomics platform, with samples clearly split into GEX, ADT, and VDJ libraries. | Samples were inferred as a layer-split 'CITE-seq' experiment capturing gene expression (scRNA-seq), surface-protein representation (CITE-seq/ADT), and TCR specificities (VDJ) on CD4+ Tconv/Treg cells isolated from human liver with hepatocellular carcinoma and paired background tissues on the 10x Genomics platform.
